name: @maronn-oidc/e2e
description: Playwright E2E tests for CLI-generated OpenID Provider samples

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:hono-cloudflare && pnpm run test:e2e:express-flyio && pnpm run test:e2e:fastify-flyio && pnpm run test:e2e:nextjs-vercel
scripts.test:e2e:hono-cloudflare: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-hono-cloudflare build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-hono-cloudflare E2E_OP_PORT=3010 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3020 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3030 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3010 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3020 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3030 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:express-flyio: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-express-flyio build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-express-flyio E2E_OP_PORT=3110 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3120 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3130 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3110 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3120 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3130 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:fastify-flyio: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-fastify-flyio build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-fastify-flyio E2E_OP_PORT=3210 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3220 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3230 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3210 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3220 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3230 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:nextjs-vercel: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-nextjs-vercel build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-nextjs-vercel E2E_OP_PORT=3310 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3320 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3330 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3310 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3320 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3330 playwright test
